# Chapter 4: Phase diagrams  (~90 pp)
- 4.1 Single-component phase diagrams (10) · 4.2 Binary diagrams (15) · 4.3 Ternary diagrams (10) · 4.4 Lever rule (12) · 4.5 Eutectics, peritectics (12) · 4.6 Phase transformations and TTT diagrams (15) · 4.7 Worked example: Fe-C diagram and steel heat treatment (10) · 4.8 Failure section: improper heat treatment and brittle parts (6)

**Archetype**: stability, scaling. **Project**: heat-treat a small steel sample; measure hardness; explain via phase transformation. **Exercises**: 35.
